title: Create snapshot by group, not by board.
excerpt: We manage our projects and create them at the group level. To use the snapshot feature we would need to retake snapshot of existing items that might move in the timeline. This would render the previous snapshot “useless”…

posts.author: Avc (Adriaan)
posts.cookedHtml: We manage our projects and create them at the group level. To use the snapshot feature we would need to retake snapshot of existing items that might move in the timeline. This would render the previous snapshot “useless” as far as I can tell. Would love to have the possibility to select a group to take the new snapshot of, and maybe even add it to the current snapshot, or something like that. If there are any workarounds, or a feature I am missing I would love to hear it.
